name: tiny-lru
description: A fast, lightweight LRU (Least Recently Used) cache for JavaScript with O(1) operations and optional TTL support.
author: Jason Mulligan <jason.mulligan@avoidwork.com>

scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run rollup
scripts.benchmark:all: npm run benchmark:modern && npm run benchmark:perf && npm run benchmark:comparison
scripts.fix: oxlint --fix *.js benchmarks src tests/unit && oxfmt *.js benchmarks src tests/unit --write
scripts.lint: oxlint *.js benchmarks src tests/unit && oxfmt *.js benchmarks/*.js src/*.js tests/unit/*.js --check
scripts.coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-exclude=dist/** --test-coverage-exclude=tests/** --test-reporter=spec tests/**/*.test.js 2>&1 | grep -A 1000 "start of coverage report" > coverage.txt
